title: EXIF Cleaner
description: Drop a photo to inspect its EXIF (camera, capture time, GPS location, etc.) and strip every trace of metadata with one click — fully in your browser.

notice.title: Processed locally, never uploaded
notice.description: Your photos never leave this device. EXIF often carries sensitive data such as GPS coordinates, camera serial numbers, and original timestamps — clean them before sharing.

upload.heading: Select or drop images
upload.drop: Drop images here, or click to pick
upload.hint: Supports JPG / PNG / WebP / HEIC, up to 20 MB per file

details.gpsWarning: This photo carries precise coordinates that may reveal where it was taken

errors.zipFailed: Failed to build the ZIP, please retry
